title: task
description: Zephyr routing/ has dtn.c for delay-tolerant networking support. Neither Rust nor Python have DTN implementations. DTN is useful for intermittent connectivity scenarios. Consider porting or creating unified implementation.
notes: DTN store-and-forward (spec 9.8) now implemented across C (lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/dtn.c with fixed wraparound/eviction safety), Rust (lichen-node/src/routing.rs:DtnBuffer with VecDeque FIFO + tests), and Python (router.py with deque + MAX_TTL validation). Consistent API, eviction, expiry, pending IIDs. Multiple codereview passes completed. Task complete.
